creator: girgen@partitur.se
text:
bento.freebsd.org fails to automatically build a package for qt-2.3.1
because of one single manpage missing from the list. 93 other ports
depend on this in order to be built. Seems reasonable to get bento
happy.

Fix: This should fix it, though I cannot test all the stuff bento
does. Seems simple and correct, though.
How-To-Repeat: http://bento.FreeBSD.org/errorlogs/4-full/ look for qt-2.3.1 and
click. In the log, look for:

  list of extra files and directories in /usr/X11R6
  man/man3/qwswindow.3qt extra
